scripts.install:app: rm -rf /Applications/TagWave.app && cp -r src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/TagWave.app /Applications/TagWave.app && /System/Library/Frameworks/CoreServices.framework/Frameworks/LaunchServices.framework/Support/lsregister -f /Applications/TagWave.app && touch src-tauri/target/.metadata_never_index && touch src-tauri/target/debug/.metadata_never_index && touch src-tauri/target/release/.metadata_never_index && mdimport /Applications/TagWave.app && echo '✓ TagWave instalado e Spotlight atualizado'
scripts.ship: npm run tauri build && npm run install:app
